title: senecio argutus
intro: Senecio argutus, also known as Prairie Fire or Cutleaf Fleabane, is a perennial plant native to the prairies of North America. It is a member of the daisy family and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, and its leaves and stems are often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures. However, due to its pyrrolizidine alkaloid content, caution should be exercised when using Senecio argutus, as excessive consumption may cause liver damage.
